name: Medium Tuscan Ceramic Handled Vase Blue - Threshold™
description:
Immerse your space in cultural allure with this Medium Tuscan Ceramic Handled Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this handheld Tuscan vase is designed in a blue hue to add a pop of color to your decor. You can fill this watertight vase with fresh blooms or your favorite faux flowers to create a centerpiece for any cozy nook in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
